wp_title_tagline: Jacksonville's Pest Control & Lawn Care Experts
meta_description_default: RightWay Integrated Lawn & Pest Solutions serves Jacksonville, FL and surrounding areas. Veteran-owned pest control and lawn care — call for a free estimate.
hero_headline: Pest Control & Lawn Care Jacksonville Trusts
hero_subheadline: Veteran-owned, science-based service for Jacksonville and St. Johns County. Licensed technicians, same-day availability, 100% satisfaction guarantee.
about_short: RightWay was founded by veteran Greg Cressman with one goal: deliver the caliber of service that big national companies can't. Every treatment plan is built around your property and the specific pest or lawn issue — not a one-size-fits-all contract.

hubs.name: Lawn Care
hubs.description: Fertilization, weed control, pest treatment, and tree care for NE Florida's challenging subtropical turf conditions.

services.name: Pest Control
services.description: Comprehensive pest protection plans for ants, roaches, spiders, and more.

services.name: Termite Control
services.description: Termite inspections, liquid barrier treatments, and bait station programs with warranty.

services.name: Mosquito Control
services.description: Barrier spray programs that reduce mosquito populations in your yard all season.

services.name: Lawn Fertilization & Weed Control
services.description: Customized fertilization and weed control for St. Augustine and Zoysia lawns in NE Florida.

services.name: Tree & Shrub Service
services.description: Deep root feeding, pest and disease treatment, and health inspections for ornamentals.

services.name: Flea & Tick Treatment
services.description: Yard-wide treatment that eliminates fleas and ticks where they breed and hide.

differentiators.title: Veteran-Owned & Operated
differentiators.description: Greg Cressman brings military-grade attention to detail and accountability to every service call. Your property is treated like a mission.

differentiators.title: Licensed & Certified Technicians
differentiators.description: State license JB324154. Every tech is UF IFAS-trained and certified — not just spraying and hoping.

differentiators.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
differentiators.description: If pests or weeds return between visits, we come back at no charge. No runaround, no fine print.

process_steps.title: Free Inspection
process_steps.description: A licensed technician visits your property, identifies the exact pest or lawn issue, and gives you a straight answer.

process_steps.title: Custom Treatment Plan
process_steps.description: No cookie-cutter contracts. Your plan is built for your property, your pest pressure, and your lawn type.

process_steps.title: Treatment Day
process_steps.description: We arrive on time, explain what we're doing, and complete the service — typically in under 90 minutes.

process_steps.title: Guaranteed Follow-Up
process_steps.description: If anything comes back between scheduled visits, we return free. That's the RightWay guarantee.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: Greg's team showed up the same day I called and actually explained what they were treating and why. Every other company just sprays and leaves. These guys are different.

testimonials.name: Tom R.
testimonials.quote: We've had our lawn on the RightWay program for two years. It looks better than it ever did when we used TruGreen. Way more responsive too.

testimonials.name: Diane K.
testimonials.quote: Called about a termite scare. They came out the next morning, gave us a real inspection report, and the price was fair. Highly recommend.

hero_image.alt: RightWay pest control technician treating a Jacksonville FL home exterior
